comment: Rescorla (1970): A and B separately paired with US to asymptote, then AB compound with same US.
input: Overexpectation(phase1_a = Pair.ForwardDelay(a, shock, isi=10-s, cs_duration=15-s), phase1_b = Pair.ForwardDelay(b, shock, isi=10-s, cs_duration=15-s), phase2_compound = Pair.ForwardDelay(Compound([a, b]), shock, isi=10-s, cs_duration=15-s), test = Extinction(a))
